name: Git 工具
description: 统一的 dtool Git 工具。本地通过 changes/diff 将当前分支与用户指定分支对比；远程覆盖 Git 页面操作。
tool_description: Use changes to inspect a structured change list and diff to inspect a full or single-file patch. In branch mode compare_branch is required and always means the branch explicitly selected by the user. Remote actions cover dtool Git page operations.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: changes | diff | config_list | current_branch | pull | change_branch | status | commit_log | change_remote_branch | remote_branches | group_branches | quick_create_branch | set_safe | save_credentials | upload_file | settings_list | config_add | config_delete | group_list | group_add | group_delete | quick_list

parameters.name: compare_branch
parameters.description: changes/diff 的明确对比分支；branch 模式必填

parameters.name: local_dir
parameters.description: 本地 Git 仓库目录

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: diff 的可选单文件路径

parameters.name: include_workspace
parameters.description: 是否把工作区最终状态合入分支比较

parameters.name: extra_excludes
parameters.description: 额外排除的仓库相对路径

parameters.name: max_diff_bytes
parameters.description: 最大 diff UTF-8 字节数

parameters.name: discard_local_changes
parameters.description: 明确授权后才可开启的破坏性清理选项

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: 配置和分组管理请求对象
